title: thelypodium lasiophyllum
intro: Thelypodium lasiophyllum, also known as California pepper-grass, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can help in treating skin conditions and wounds. The health benefits of Thelypodium lasiophyllum include reducing swelling and pain, promoting healing, and acting as a natural insect repellent. Herbal preparations of Thelypodium lasiophyllum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
